Monorepo? Another Way to Manage Projects — Building a Vue3 Monorepo With Vite + pnpm

What is a Monorepo? How is it different from a regular project setup? I had a need for one recently, so I wrote this up. The post walks through Monolith vs Multi vs Monorepo, plus a hands-on Vue3 Monorepo build using Vite + pnpm.
One ni to Rule Them All? Replace npm/yarn/pnpm/bun with antfu/ni

Ever wondered something? When you pick up someone else's project, do you run `npm install` or `yarn install`? With so many package installers out there, you have to open the project to figure out which one. This post introduces a really clever solution — `ni`.
